title: eleocharis sellowiana
intro: Eleocharis sellowiana, also known as Sellow's spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleocharis sellowiana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
